title: colpodium minutum
intro: Colpodium minutum, also known as small club moss, is a small, annual or perennial plant species belonging to the family Lycopodiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Colpodium minutum include relieving coughs, reducing inflammation, and promoting overall respiratory well-being. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, where it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
